title: tanacetum cappadocicum
intro: Tanacetum cappadocicum, also known as Cappadocian tansy, is a flowering plant native to Turkey and other parts of the world. It belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in relieving digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Tanacetum cappadocicum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
